sql:
SELECT
data_sibay.nisn,
data_sibay.npsn,
data_sibay.`nama siswa`,
data_sibay.`nomor rekening`,
data_sibay.`nama di rekening`,
data_sibay.file_scan,
data_sibay.status,
profil.`nama Madrasah`,
profil.NSM,
profil.`Nomor Telpon`,
data_sibay.kelas,
data_sibay.jenis_kelamin,
data_sibay.status_siswa,
data_sibay.pip,
data_sibay.catatan,
data_sibay.tahun,
data_sibay.kunci_operator,
data_sibay.kunci_kemenag_pidie,
CASE
WHEN data_sibay.kunci_operator <> "" THEN "1"
else "0"           
END AS status_kunci_oprt,
case
WHEN data_sibay.kunci_kemenag_pidie <> "" THEN "1"
else "0"           
END AS status_kunci_kantor,
data_sibay.hp_kepala,
data_sibay.hp_wali,
data_sibay.id
FROM data_sibay
INNER JOIN profil ON data_sibay.npsn = profil.NPSN
INNER JOIN sptjm ON data_sibay.npsn = sptjm.npsn AND data_sibay.tahun = sptjm.tahun
WHERE (data_sibay.tahun = YEAR(CURDATE()))
name: data_sibay

fields.name: status_kunci_oprt
fields.sqlExpression:
CASE
WHEN data_sibay.kunci_operator <> "" THEN "1"
else "0"           
END

fields.name: status_kunci_kantor
fields.sqlExpression:
case
WHEN data_sibay.kunci_kemenag_pidie <> "" THEN "1"
else "0"           
END
